intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 (matrix.mtx.gz, barcodes.tsv.gz, features.tsv.gz). Using scanpy, do standard QC, normalization, highly-variable genes, PCA, neighbors, Leiden clustering and a UMAP, then identify marker genes per cluster and show me a UMAP and a marker dotplot.

blocks.text: Good, the files are there. Now let me load the GSM5746268 sample and run the standard workflow. I'll use the `scrna-qc-clustering` skill as my reference.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "description": "Standard scanpy processing for ONE scRNA-seq sample.", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + first-pass clustering (scanpy). Halt and present_plan before running on an unfamiliar dataset \u2014 the QC thresholds and the clustering resolution are dataset-dependent. Steps: sc.read_10x_mtx; calculate_qc_metrics; filter cells (n_genes>=200) & genes; filter pct_counts_mt; normalize_total(target_sum=1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; scale; pca; neighbors; leiden; umap; rank_genes_groups (wilcoxon) for markers. Plots: QC violin, HVG, UMAP colored by leiden, marker dotplot."}

blocks.text: Perfect. Now let me present a plan for the analysis with sensible defaults:

input.title: Standard scRNA-seq QC and clustering of GSM5746268
input.summary: Load, QC, normalize, cluster, and identify markers for the PBMC sample using scanpy

steps.title: Load 10x matrix triplet
steps.description: Read GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 matrix.mtx, barcodes.tsv, and features.tsv from DATA_DIR

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Compute n_genes_by_counts, total_counts, pct_counts_mt per cell and genes_per_cell per gene
expected_outputs: obs and var with QC columns

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Retain cells with n_genes_by_counts >= 200 and < 5000; genes detected in >= 3 cells; filter cells with pct_counts_mt > 20%

steps.title: Build neighborhood graph and Leiden clustering
Visualize UMAP and marker dotplot
steps.description: Plot UMAP colored by leiden cluster, and dotplot of top markers per cluster

assumptions: QC filtering: n_genes >= 200, n_genes < 5000, pct_counts_mt <= 20% (typical PBMC thresholds)
Will compute mitochondrial gene fraction (assuming standard mt- prefix for mouse genes)
Leiden resolution = 1.0 (standard; can adjust if clustering looks off)
Using wilcoxon rank-sum test for marker identification
Output plots at 150 DPI, colorblind-safe palettes
